XMLDB.COMMENT: XMLDB file for Resource Statistics plugin

TABLE.NAME: local_resourcestats_views
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores view statistics for course modules

FIELD.NAME: totalviews
FIELD.COMMENT: Total number of views including repeats

FIELD.NAME: uniqueviews
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of distinct students who viewed

FIELD.NAME: lastuserid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the last user who viewed

TABLE.NAME: local_resourcestats_user_views
TABLE.COMMENT: Tracks per-student view counts and timestamps for each module

FIELD.NAME: viewcount
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of times this student accessed the module

FIELD.NAME: firstviewtime
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp of the student's first access

FIELD.NAME: lastviewtime
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp of the student's most recent access
